calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Andrew S. Werner, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Peter K. Kong, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Bruno Nicoletti, an individual, or Bay European Automotive Company, Inc.
Amended default was entered against defendants on July 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Peter K. Kong, and against the Defaulted Defendants Bruno Nicoletti, an individual, and Bay European Automotive Company, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $15,073.21.
Prejudgment Interest - $954.03.
Attorney's Fees - $2,080.00.
Costs - $439.25, for a total judgment in the amount of $18,546.49.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
